_meta.note: Inheritance 1–9 Heir / Lesser Wyrm milestones and Inheritance 10 True Dragon (Apotheosis) paraphrased from Scion: Dragon (pp. 117–119). Starting at 10 is uncommon—confirm with your Storyguide.

1.name: Hatchling
1.summary: Starting Inheritance; narrow but notable power; Scent the Divine; starter Spells and Knacks per chargen (p. 118).

2.name: Asset
2.summary: Tests and trial runs; +1 Calling dot, +1 Spell, +1 Draconic Knack (p. 118).

3.name: Seeker
3.summary: Cravings and visions intensify; once per arc optional Momentum + Craving hook; +1 Spell, +1 Draconic Knack (p. 118).

4.name: Agent
4.summary: Trusted operative with schemes in motion; +1 Calling dot, +1 Spell, +1 Draconic Knack (p. 118).

5.name: Conspirator
5.summary: Greater draconic insight; harder to hide; gain access to one new Dragon Magic plus spell/knack package (p. 118).

6.name: Cabalist
6.summary: Inner-circle intrigue; +1 Calling dot in patron’s Calling, +1 Spell, +1 Draconic Knack (p. 119).

7.name: Arcanist
7.summary: Expert intriguer; Craving Condition Momentum hook scales; +1 Spell, +1 Draconic Knack (p. 119).

8.name: Vizier
8.summary: Advisor tier; may lose human shape; +1 Spell from patron or signature Flight Magic, +1 Calling dot, +1 preferred Draconic Knack (p. 119).

9.name: Mastermind
9.summary: Near-draconic perspective; +1 Spell from patron or signature Flight Magic, +1 Calling dot in patron’s Calling, +1 Draconic Knack (p. 119).

10.name: True Dragon
10.summary: Heir Apotheosis—true draconic being; ends the Heir path in favor of the dragon’s nature (pp. 117–119). Full mechanics and table text: confirm at the table.
